author: 0xpatches
content:
I'm not on the call but i see langers never showed up. 

rp uses state proof for validator withdrawal credentials, balances, and withdrawals, if i recall correctly

author: 0xpatches
content: there's some nascent talk of switching to a proof on the incremental merkle tree in the deposit contract to replace the withdrawal credentials proof, but from what i understand the final balance and withdrawal proofs are fairly crucial to their design
